docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $455.31 FILED BY LOCK WORLD AS TO DEFENDANT DULL, JULIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
